characters.appearance: White, humanoid robot with a smooth, metallic face and blue eyes. It has a glowing blue circular core on its chest.
characters.wardrobe: No clothing; white metallic robotic body with mechanical joints visible at the neck and shoulders.

characters.appearance: Young woman with a slim build and fair complexion. She has blonde hair with bangs and visible tattoos on her arms and hands.
characters.wardrobe: White short-sleeve t-shirt, clear-framed glasses, and multiple layered silver chain necklaces.
characters.demeanor: Casual, initially hesitant, but becomes convinced and enthusiastic.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: क्या कर रही हो? [What are you doing?]
Character B says: I burn candle.
Character A says: तुम्हें कहना चाहिए "I'm lighting a candle". [You should say "I'm lighting a candle".]
Character A says: तुम्हारी English practice कैसी चल रही है? [How is your English practice going?]
Character B says: उफ़... बस ठीक-ठाक। [Ugh... just so-so.]
Character A says: Tension मत लो! [Don't worry!]
Character A says: रोज़ practice करोगी तो बहुत जल्दी confident हो जाओगी। [If you practice daily, you'll become confident very soon.]
Character A says: Supernova AI tutor के साथ। [With the Supernova AI tutor.]
Character B says: AI? पर मेरे पास expensive classes के लिए पैसे नहीं हैं। [AI? But I don't have money for expensive classes.]
Character A says: अरे! [Hey!]
Character A says: Supernova बहुत affordable है। [Supernova is very affordable.]
Character A says: उन महँगे courses की तरह नहीं। [Unlike those expensive courses.]
Character B says: सच में? [Really?]
Character A says: हाँ, बिल्कुल! [Yes, absolutely!]
Character A says: इसमें तुम real-life situations में English बोलने की practice कर सकती हो। [In this, you can practice speaking English in real-life situations.]
Character A says: अपने AI tutor के साथ। [With your AI tutor.]
Character B says: क्या ये एक real tutor जैसा है? [Is it like a real tutor?]
Character A says: बिल्कुल! ये तुम्हारी grammar और pronunciation ठीक करता है। [Absolutely! It corrects your grammar and pronunciation.]
Character A says: और बिना डरे English बोलने में मदद करता है। [And helps you speak English without fear.]
Character B says: Okay... तो मैं अभी Supernova download करती हूँ। [Okay... then I'll download Supernova right now.]
Character A says: बहुत बढ़िया decision! [Great decision!]
Character A says: चलो, साथ में English बोलते हैं! [Come on, let's speak English together!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable, visual grammar correction.
- Introduces the common problem of hesitant English and the perceived barrier of expensive courses.
- Positions Supernova as an affordable, practical AI tutor for real-life conversation practice, stripping away the original's 'free' and 'native in 1 month' claims.
- Ends with a clear call to action and an encouraging, older-sibling tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
क्या कर रही हो? (What are you doing?)
I burn candle.
तुम्हें कहना चाहिए "I'm lighting a candle". (You should say "I'm lighting a candle".)
तुम्हारी English practice कैसी चल रही है? (How is your English practice going?)
उफ़... बस ठीक-ठाक। (Ugh... just so-so.)
Tension मत लो! (Don't worry!)
रोज़ practice करोगी तो बहुत जल्दी confident हो जाओगी। (If you practice daily, you'll become confident very soon.)
Supernova AI tutor के साथ। (With the Supernova AI tutor.)
AI? पर मेरे पास expensive classes के लिए पैसे नहीं हैं। (AI? But I don't have money for expensive classes.)
अरे! (Hey!)
Supernova बहुत affordable है। (Supernova is very affordable.)
उन महँगे courses की तरह नहीं। (Unlike those expensive courses.)
सच में? (Really?)
हाँ, बिल्कुल! (Yes, absolutely!)
इसमें तुम real-life situations में English बोलने की practice कर सकती हो। (In this, you can practice speaking English in real-life situations.)
अपने AI tutor के साथ। (With your AI tutor.)
क्या ये एक real tutor जैसा है? (Is it like a real tutor?)
बिल्कुल! ये तुम्हारी grammar और pronunciation ठीक करता है। (Absolutely! It corrects your grammar and pronunciation.)
और बिना डरे English बोलने में मदद करता है। (And helps you speak English without fear.)
Okay... तो मैं अभी Supernova download करती हूँ। (Okay... then I'll download Supernova right now.)
बहुत बढ़िया decision! (Great decision!)
चलो, साथ में English बोलते हैं! (Come on, let's speak English together!)

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: अभी Supernova download करो! और आज ही practice शुरू करो। [Download Supernova now! And start practicing today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a clear end card with the Supernova app name.
- Delivers a direct call to action to download and start practicing immediately.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
अभी Supernova download करो! और आज ही practice शुरू करो। (Download Supernova now! And start practicing today.)
